---
title: "Urban Music Atlas"
format: 
  html:
    theme: darkly
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
---

## Welcome {.unnumbered}

Spanish-language urban music (2015–2025) across three geographic contexts.

::: panel-tabset
## Background

## Track Features

## Chroma Features

## Loudness

## Timbre

## Clustering

## Contribution
:::
